UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-FEB-06-2013:
Plaintiff FRED LEVINSON, Trustee for the Levinson Family Trust is present with Attorney
Cindy Lee;
Defendant CATHERINE DECRISTOFARO is present with Attorney Paul H. Nathan

Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants, and respective counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions. The Court also holds further settlement discussions in chambers.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is filed. The trial date of FEB-11-2013 is vacated.
